title: Deep Iris Analysis
description: Branched 22-step statistical exploration of Fisher's Iris dataset: descriptive stats, distribution diagnostics, three-method outlier consensus, conditional parametric/non-parametric hypothesis testing, classification baseline, and a sensitivity rerun on the cleaned data.

load_data.name: Load Dataset
load_data.does: Read iris.csv and report row count, column types, and first-5 preview.

schema_validate.name: Validate Schema
schema_validate.does: Confirm 5 columns with expected types and zero nulls; flag any drift from the documented schema.

data_quality.name: Data Quality Checks
data_quality.does: Run row-level checks: null counts, duplicate rows, value-range sanity, class balance per species.

descriptive_stats.name: Descriptive Statistics
descriptive_stats.does: Compute mean, sd, median, IQR per feature x species; produce summary table.

feature_distributions.name: Feature Distributions
feature_distributions.does: Render KDE per feature (4 facets, colored by species) for shape inspection.

species_distributions.name: Per-Species Distributions
species_distributions.does: Box + jittered scatter per feature x species; QQ grid for normality at a glance.

assumption_check.name: Assumption Checks
assumption_check.does: Shapiro-Wilk per feature x species (normality), Levene's test per feature (homogeneity of variance), and an independence note.

outlier_iqr.name: Outliers - IQR Rule
outlier_iqr.does: Flag rows with any feature outside [Q1 - 1.5*IQR, Q3 + 1.5*IQR].

outlier_zscore.name: Outliers - Z-score
outlier_zscore.does: Flag rows where |z| > 3 on any feature (univariate, ignores species).

outlier_mahalanobis.name: Outliers - Mahalanobis
outlier_mahalanobis.does: Compute Mahalanobis D^2 against the joint multivariate mean; flag rows above chi-square quantile.

outlier_consensus.name: Outlier Consensus
outlier_consensus.does: Cross-tag the three outlier sets; build a Venn diagram of agreement.

method_select.name: Select Hypothesis-Test Method
method_select.does: Decide parametric vs non-parametric per feature based on the assumption checks; emit a decision diagram.

anova_oneway.name: One-way ANOVA (parametric)
anova_oneway.does: Run one-way ANOVA per feature across species; report F, df, p-value.

tukey_hsd.name: Tukey HSD (parametric)
tukey_hsd.does: Pairwise Tukey HSD with Bonferroni-adjusted CIs on the species means.

kruskal_wallis.name: Kruskal-Wallis (non-parametric)
kruskal_wallis.does: Rank-based test as a robust alternative when normality / variance assumptions wobble.

method_compare.name: Compare Parametric vs Non-parametric
method_compare.does: Side-by-side ANOVA vs Kruskal-Wallis effect sizes (eta^2 vs epsilon^2) and p-values.

correlation_pca.name: Correlation + PCA
correlation_pca.does: Pearson + Spearman correlation matrices; PCA on standardised features; biplot + scree.

classification_lda.name: LDA Baseline
classification_lda.does: Fit Linear Discriminant Analysis with 10-fold CV; render the 2-D decision boundary.

cv_compare.name: Cross-Validation Comparison
cv_compare.does: Compare CV mean accuracy +/- SE across the three classifiers; pick a leader.

rerun_cleaned.name: Sensitivity - Rerun on Cleaned Data
rerun_cleaned.does: Drop union-of-three outlier rows and refit all three classifiers under identical CV.

compare_full_vs_cleaned.name: Compare Full vs Cleaned
compare_full_vs_cleaned.does: Side-by-side accuracy on full vs outlier-removed data; quantify whether outliers materially hurt the model.

compose_report.name: Compose Report
compose_report.does: Assemble all figures, tables, and findings into report.md and finalize a PDF; await reviewer sign-off.

deliverable.description: Iris analysis report (PDF + Markdown) with figures and tables.
